concept: Fishing Dad: Because the Fish Don't Argue Back
title: Fishing Dad Shirt Funny Outdoor Humor Gift for Fisherman Fathers
description:
There’s a reason dad disappears to the lake every chance he gets—and it’s not just for the fish. "Fishing Dad: Because the Fish Don't Argue Back" says what every angler parent knows deep down: nature listens better than teens do. Perfect mix of relatable dad humor and fishing pride, this design hooks you with a chuckle and reels you in with style. 

Perfect for:
- Dads who’d rather bait a hook than hear another teen tantrum.
- Father’s Day gifts for the angler in your life.
- Conversations around the grill about the one (fish or teen) that got away.

DETAILS:
- Minimalist, bold linework featuring a father figure silhouette casting a line.
- Typography reads: "Fishing Dad: Because the Fish Don't Argue Back."
- Available in a full range of light and dark colors.
- Made-to-order, sustainable production.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
